an5.175:1.1: “Endowed with these five qualities, a lay follower is an outcaste of a lay follower, a stain of a lay follower, a dregs of a lay follower.
an5.175:1.3: He/she does not have conviction (in the Buddha’s awakening);
an5.175:1.5: is eager for protective charms & ceremonies;
an5.175:1.6: trusts protective charms & ceremonies, not kamma;
an5.175:1.7: and searches for recipients of his/her offerings outside (of the Saṅgha), and gives offerings there first.
an5.175:2.1: Endowed with these five qualities, a lay follower is an outcaste of a lay follower, a stain of a lay follower, a dregs of a lay follower.
